response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development — a rare and explicitly required skill. Strong testing culture (TDD, custom test frameworks, testing workshops) and cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) align well. Gaps are mostly at the framework level (no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin) rather than fundamentals, so an interview is warranted.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with the core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS
Current AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing workshops and open-source test tooling
concerns: Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated; Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly listed
Significant portion of career in D language, less directly transferable to the primary stack
